positive: A mesmerizing illustration of a stylized, whimsical forest scene at dusk. Central subject: a glowing, fantastical bioluminescent flora and fauna (mushrooms, butterflies, glowing moss) interacting in a perfect circle composition. The style is vibrant neo-art nouveau mixed with digital enamel painting, featuring rich, deep emeralds, sapphire blues, and contrasting pops of luminous gold and magenta. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and intricate linework, suitable for repeating apparel patterns. Perfect symmetry and central composition are crucial. Cinematic, volumetric lighting that emphasizes glow and depth. High detail, vector art quality.
negative: blur, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, deformities, extra limbs, messy, noise, out of frame, jpeg artifacts
